titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Biographical Information on Yale University Affiliated Individuals
Biographical Information on Yale University Affiliated Individuals
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday May 7, 2021 at 09:30

did.unittitle: Biographical information on Yale University affiliated individuals
did.abstract: The records consist of biographies, vitae, photographs and related materials documenting the careers of members of the Yale community.

corpname.part: Yale University. Office of Public Affairs

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 4-C (YRG 4-C), Records documenting public information functions of Yale University.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Biographical Information on Yale University Affiliated Individuals (RU 237). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Yale University records are arranged and described at the accession level by the creating office. The University Archives creates collection level descriptive records, but typically does no further arrangement and description at the accession level.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of biographies, vitae, photographs and related materials documenting the careers of members of the Yale community.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

corpname.part: Yale University. Office of Public Affairs

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: No online inventory available. Paper inventory available in repository.

did.unittitle: Faculty vitae, press releases and clippings

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

did.unittitle: Angell, Katharine C. (Mrs. James Rowland Angell)
Tilson, Catherine S. (Mrs. John Q., Jr.)
Ford, Gerald: Yale Law School Sesquicentennial Convocation Press Kit
Israel and Egypt: United Nations Ambassadors
Jay, Peter (British Ambassador to United States)
New Haven High School Day at Yale
Whitney Humanities Center: Yale Journal of Criticism
Class of 1929--A. b. Giamatti, Hon. Member
Biographical information on Yale University faculty

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

did.unittitle: Material collected on George H.W. Bush
Looking Forward, an Autobiography , photocopies from book
Meeting with Yale president Benno Schmidt
"The Way We Were in Poppy's Day," Yale Alumni Magazine
Yale Class of 1948, 40th Anniversary year book, clippings and photographs

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The materials consist of obituaries, news clippings, vitae, and press releases documenting deceased Yale faculty.

altformavail.head: Existence and Location of Copies
altformavail.p: A copy of this material is available in digital form from Manuscripts and Archives. Contact Manuscripts and Archives at mssa.assist@yale.edu to request access to the digital copy.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.
